---
title: "State of AI in Business 2025: Why 95% Get Zero P&L"
description: "$30–40B invested, 95% of orgs see no P&L impact — five traits the winning systems share."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-08-30"
categories: [AI, agentic systems, paper, future of work, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Cover page of the State of AI in Business 2025 report. ([Source](https://mlq.ai/media/quarterly_decks/v0.1_State_of_AI_in_Business_2025_Report.pdf))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Despite $30–40B in GenAI investment, 95% of orgs are seeing zero P&L impact. Why? According to the State of AI in Business 2025 report by Project NANDA and MIT researchers [[1]](#ref-1), it's because most tools don't learn, don't adapt, and don't integrate.

So what does a winning system look like?

- **Agentic by design:** Persistent memory + autonomy = fewer prompts, smoother orchestration across workflows.
- **Learning-capable:** Retains memory, adapts to context, and improves with feedback (unlike static tools).
- **Workflow-integrated:** Plugs into existing systems with minimal disruption.
- **Narrow but deep:** Starts with a focused, high-value use case and expands from there.
- **Trusted:** Clear data boundaries and builder credibility matter more than flashy demos.

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Project NANDA + MIT. *v0.1 State of AI in Business 2025 Report*. <https://mlq.ai/media/quarterly_decks/v0.1_State_of_AI_in_Business_2025_Report.pdf>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_v01stateofaiinbusiness2025reportpdf-activity-7367739927888855042-MXh4).*
